title: libocedrus dolabrata
intro: Libocedrus dolabrata, also known as the Lawson cypress or Portuguese cypress, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Iberian Peninsula and northwestern Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce swelling and fight off infections. The health benefits of Libocedrus dolabrata include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and other respiratory issues. Libocedrus dolabrata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in conjunction with other herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
